user_prompt: Ready the krak grenade for calibration
prayer:
Approach the krak grenade with mechadendrites extended in reverence, beseeching the Omnissiah to calm its volatile Machine Spirit.
Inspect the krak grenade's fuze mechanisms and warhead alignment for calibration, chanting the Canticle of Precision.
Anoint the guidance vanes of the krak grenade with sacred unguents whilst invoking the rites of calibration harmony.
Commence calibration sequences upon the krak grenade, verifying the Machine Spirit's harmonious resonance through auspex scans.
Sanctify the calibrated krak grenade, sealing its potency under the Omnissiah's watchful gaze.

user_prompt: Sanctify the storm bolter during initialization
prayer:
Kneel before the storm bolter, intoning the Litany of Initialization to awaken its dual-barrelled Machine Spirit.
Purify the storm bolter's firing servos and ammunition feeds with binary incense during initialization rites.
Invoke the Omnissiah's blessing upon the storm bolter, aligning its auspex sights and power cells in sacred sequence.
Test-fire a null-round through the storm bolter to confirm the Machine Spirit's initialization and furious compliance.
Seal the storm bolter with electro-consecrated wax, proclaiming its readiness for the Emperor's wrath.

user_prompt: Urgent lightning claw a repair needed
prayer:
Present the lightning claw to the forge-altar, murmuring apologies to its wounded Machine Spirit for repair.
Dissect the lightning claw's disrupted power fields and adamantium talons, beseeching the Omnissiah for restorative grace.
Realign the lightning claw's disruption generators with sanctified mechadendrites during the repair incantations.
Reinfuse the lightning claw's Machine Spirit with noospheric harmonies, purging corruption from its depths.
Test the repaired lightning claw against a servitor-flesh, hailing the Omnissiah's triumph in renewal.

prayer:

Anoint the Kastelan robot's phosphor blasters and slab-shields with lustral oils for activation purity.
Command the Kastelan robot to rise, verifying its data-engines and servomotors in harmonious activation.
Proclaim the Kastelan robot battle-ready, its Machine Spirit now thrumming with the Motive Force.
